creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 217742
angle-grinder-0.15.0.diff

* Disable default self-update feature to 
  avoid discrepancy between package versions.
* Remove patch from files/* as addressed and merged
  upstream.

Changelog:

 * https://github.com/rcoh/angle-grinder/releases/v0.15.0

QA:

 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.1-RELEASE-p8, amd64).

MFH: No (Port not in 2020Q3).
